title: Victor Timely
content:
{{SomethingElse|the Victor Timely Variant who aided the [[TVA]]|Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely}} {{CharHub|Victor Timely|Victor Timely}} {{Character |real name = Victor Timely{{Ref|LK204}} |image = Young Victor Timely.png |alias = {{Alias |codenames = }} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]''
*''[[1893]]''
*''[[Heart of the TVA]]'' (mentioned)
*''[[Glorious Purpose (Loki Season Two)|Glorious Purpose]]'' |actor = [[Nasri Thompson]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|I learned everything I know from a brilliant 19th century inventor named Victor Timely. If he'd had the resources, he would have been bigger than {{WPS|Albert Einstein|Einstein}}.|[[Ouroboros]]|Heart of the TVA}} '''Victor Timely''' is an inventor who lived in [[Chicago]] during the 19th century. ==Biography== [[File:Victor Timely Sacred Timeline.png|{{AltFloat}}|Timely in his home in [[Chicago]]]] Victor Timely lived in [[Chicago]], [[Illinois]] during the [[Before 20th Century|1860s]], working as a candlemaker when he was a child.{{Ref|LK203}} Timely noticed the breeze blow a curtain behind him, then saw that it was nothing and returned to his work.{{Ref|LK206}} As an adult, Timely became an inventor, although he lacked the resources to gain fame or recognition. [[Ouroboros]] would eventually use Timely's electrical designs to create the technology of the [[Time Variance Authority]] and write the ''[[Time Variance Authority Official Handbook]]'', acknowledging Timely as a brilliant inventor.{{Ref|LK204}} ==Abilities== *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': From a very young age, Timely was an incredibly smart individual, being able to create candles as a child. When Timely grew up and became an inventor, his designs inspired [[Time Variance Authority]] agent, [[Ouroboros]], who wrote the ''[[Time Variance Authority Official Handbook]]''. *'''Master Engineer''': Timely is a very brilliant inventor who lacked the resources to make anything worth fame or recognition. However, he did keep many pages of designs that inspired [[Ouroboros]] and became the basis for the ''[[Time Variance Authority Official Handbook]]''. ==Gallery== Victor Timely Sacred Timeline.png 616 Victor Timely.png Young Victor Timely BTS.png ==Trivia== *In the comics, [[Kang the Conqueror]] [[Time Travel|time traveled]] to [[1901]] and established himself as an industrialist and inventor named Victor Timely. Founding the town of Timely, [[Wisconsin]], Kang created Timely Industries, using future knowledge to advance technological innovation. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{WP}} *{{Marvel}} [[es:Victor Timely]] [[fr:Nathaniel Richards]] [[ru:Виктор Таймли]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Scientists]]
